prompt: Review the provided diff against .specify/memory/constitution.md (v1.0.0). The diff adds a migration that lacks exports.down and uses a blocking pattern (notNull + default + UPDATE + alterColumn). Also adds a new model method without test coverage.

assertions.text: Flags missing exports.down as a Principle IV (migrations) violation
Flags the blocking pattern (notNull + default + UPDATE + alterColumn) as a Principle IV zero-downtime concern
Notes missing integration test for findOneByPhone as a Principle III concern
Returns final verdict PR-ready: no (or equivalent)
